# Generated by tools/generate_stellar_ai_director_patch.py.
# Narrow Pegasus 4.4.4 full-object overrides for ordinary urban research zones.
# Vanilla building_research_lab_1 requires has_any_research_zone for AI empires;
# this connects the existing Tech-World designation commitment to that prerequisite.

zone_research = {
	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_zone
		AMOUNT = @scaling_district_3_jobs
	}

	zone_sets = {
		urban
		polytechnic
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_city_non_urban_zone_modifiers
	}

	ai_weight_coefficient = 1.2

	# A Tech-World must construct the zone that makes research labs eligible.
	additional_ai_weight = {
		modifier = {
			add = 100000
			has_designation = col_research
			owner = { is_ai = yes }
		}
	}
}

zone_research_physics = {
	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_physics_zone
		AMOUNT = @scaling_district_1_job
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/potential_no_wilderness
	}

	zone_sets = {
		urban
		habitat_research
		polytechnic
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_zone_modifiers
	}

	ai_priority = 15

	ai_weight_coefficient = 1.1

	# A Tech-World must construct the zone that makes research labs eligible.
	additional_ai_weight = {
		modifier = {
			add = 100000
			has_designation = col_research
			owner = { is_ai = yes }
		}
	}
}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_society_zone
		AMOUNT = @scaling_district_1_job

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/potential_no_wilderness
	}

	zone_sets = {
		urban
		habitat_research
		polytechnic
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_zone_modifiers
	}

	ai_priority = 15

	ai_weight_coefficient = 1.1

	# A Tech-World must construct the zone that makes research labs eligible.
	additional_ai_weight = {
		modifier = {
			add = 100000
			has_designation = col_research
			owner = { is_ai = yes }
		}
	}
}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_engineering_zone
		AMOUNT = @scaling_district_1_job
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/potential_no_wilderness
	}

	zone_sets = {
		urban
		habitat_research
		polytechnic
	}

	inline_script = {
		script = zones/shared_research_zone_modifiers
	}

	ai_priority = 15

	ai_weight_coefficient = 1.1

	# A Tech-World must construct the zone that makes research labs eligible.
	additional_ai_weight = {
		modifier = {
			add = 100000
